content: Forensic analysis of Arjun’s smartwatch reveals the GPS module was manually disabled via Bluetooth command at 15:05:17 — 5 minutes before the signal drop reported in the FIR. The command originated from a paired Bluetooth device with MAC address 1A:2B:3C:4D:5E:6F. This device matches the tracker unit installed in Vikram Mehta’s SUV (UP-12-AB-7891), which was removed by Ramesh Kumar during his tenure as a vehicle tracker technician. The device was later found in Ramesh Kumar’s residence. The smartwatch’s accelerometer shows no violent movement between 15:05 and 15:10, suggesting Arjun was not forcibly moved during this interval — he was likely sedated or drugged. The device was not remotely disabled by the kidnappers, but by someone with internal access to the vehicle’s tracking system.
